title: Malaysian Vegan Satay
description: A plant-based version of the popular Southeast Asian dish, featuring marinated tofu skewers grilled to perfection.

ingredients.name: Tofu
ingredients.notes: firm, drained, and cut into bite-sized pieces

ingredients.name: Vegan kecap manis
ingredients.notes: or substitute with tamari and maple syrup

instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together brown sugar, kecap manis, and 2 tbsp water to make the marinade.
3. Add the tofu to the marinade and mix well.
4. Thread the marinated tofu onto the skewers.
5. Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
6. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning frequently.
7. Brush the skewers with peanut sauce during the last 2 minutes of grilling.
8. Serve hot with additional peanut sauce for dipping.
